FAQ_DATA.question: Do you offer custom web design?
FAQ_DATA.answer: Yes! Every project I work on is built from scratch or tailored specifically to your brand's unique needs and vision.

FAQ_DATA.question: How long does a typical project take?
FAQ_DATA.answer: Timelines vary depending on complexity. Small websites or video edits usually take 3-7 days, while larger enterprise projects can take 2-4 weeks.

FAQ_DATA.question: What is your revision policy?
FAQ_DATA.answer: Most plans include 3 rounds of free revisions. I want to make sure you are 100% satisfied with the final result.

FAQ_DATA.question: Do you provide hosting and maintenance?
FAQ_DATA.answer: Yes, I can handle everything from server setup and domain integration to monthly maintenance and updates.

FAQ_DATA.question: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ_DATA.answer: I accept all major credit cards, UPI (for India), and bank transfers. Secure payment links are provided for every transaction.

HERO_DATA.name: Arham Adib
HERO_DATA.description: I deliver end-to-end digital solutions, from high-end video production to full-stack web applications. My goal is to elevate your brand presence.
